evals.prompt: Ingest this: <URL or paste or file>
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator routes to the appropriate source-type ingester (ingest-website / ingest-document / inline) for cleanup, then to the right content-type ingester (ingest-recipe / ingest-meeting / etc.) for schema, runs validation, contradiction check, and updates the wiki.

evals.prompt: Save this article and apply the right schema automatically.
evals.expected_output: Same as default — orchestrator picks the route based on URL pattern, file type, and content shape.

evals.prompt: Capture this PDF — figure out where it goes.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document for cleanup, then content-type detection routes to medical / school / tax / receipt / etc. as appropriate.
